problem: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics?
mechanism: Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area
hypothesis: Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area may resolve What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 21 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
